songs.title: Muddy Waters2
songs.score:
Riff/Verse               Chorus
{start_of_tab}
e|-----------|-----------|--------------------|
B|-----------|-----------|--------------------|
G|-----------|---5-------|--------------------|
D|---7---5---|---5---5---|---7---9---10--12---|
A|---7---5---|---3---5---|---7---9---10--12---|
E|---5---3---|-------3---|---5---7---8---10---|
{end_of_tab}


They drop bombs like fallen angels
Cities on fire, ruins of civilisations
This is the end of the world we used to know
They spit on it, spit on it, spit on it, with their deadly blow

We try to keep our head above these muddy waters, muddy waters
Try to keep our head above these muddy waters, muddy waters

Thousands of corpses wandering on the sea
War! War! War! That’s all we foresee
Gods! Guns! Gold! Sleep in your prayer
On your knees, face the preachers of despair

CHORUS

Forget the others, be scared of each other
Come on brothers, we’re just cannon fodder
Forget the others, be scared of each other
Come on brothers, we’re just cannon fodder

CHORUS

OUTRO Em F A
We shall overcome,
Together we’re one
We won’t fall in rocket falls

songs.title: October Sky

INTRO

│ █ █ │ █ █ █ │ █ █ │ █ █ █ │
└─┴─┴─┴─┴─┴─┴─┴─┴─┴─┴─┴─┴─┴─┘
     1 432 X   X   X
{eot}

SYNTH LEAD

GUITAR LEAD

DRUM & BASS LEAD

VERSE 1
Don’t you - Remember when
We were made - For each other
Throwing -  Away our pain
Over the sky -  Of October

GUITAR LEAD

SYNTH LEAD

VERSE 2 
{sov}Take me - To the place
Where everything's -  Happened
Show me - Again this star
Between - Between the trees

{eov}BREAK

GUITAR LEAD

OUTRO
